case_title: KARL URIBE VS. PAYWARD VENTURES, INC. (C3593001)

docket_entries.description: ORDER ON REQUEST TO ALLOW SERVICE ON SECRETARY OF STATE FOR A DOMESTIC CORPORATION. FILED BY PLAINTIFF URIBE, KARL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-08-2018 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO OCT-03-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF KARL URIBE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PAYWARD VENTURES, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ALLEN SIEVO, CHIEF OF STAFF. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JOANNE MADDEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-05-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF URIBE, KARL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAYWARD VENTURES, INC. (C3593001) $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $850.00, SEE ATTACHED DECISION/ORDER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
